reasoning.evidence: No mention of BatchAction, DataReader, 都度起動, 常駐型, or any Nablarch batch concepts.
No mention of Jakarta Batch, JSR 352, Batchlet, Chunk, or javax.batch.

No mention of HTTPメッセージング, HTTP受信, メッセージ同期応答, or HttpMessagingRequestParsingHandler. This handler deals with general HTTP web requests, not the Nablarch messaging pattern.

Content is explicitly about a web handler (nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpRewriteHandler, module nablarch-fw-web). Mentions session scope, request scope, content path rewriting, login screen redirects, JSP-style content paths, and integration with http_response_handler and thread_context_handler — all Webアプリケーション handler queue concepts.
